detail: Hollowlost Bands, Forest Wanderers, Dockside Clans, Free Cities, Cultural League, Frost Nomads, Runebound Clans, War Bands, Clan Exiles, Dust Merchants, Border Mercenaries, Fortress Wardens, Marooned Brigands, Mountain Hermits
lore: A new world has been forged. 14 factions (Hollowlost Bands, Forest Wanderers, Dockside Clans, Free Cities, Cultural League, Frost Nomads, Runebound Clans, War Bands, Clan Exiles, Dust Merchants, Border Mercenaries, Fortress Wardens, Marooned Brigands, Mountain Hermits) now vie for dominance across Aeloria. The age begins — every throne is unsettled, every border unproven.
Across all of Aeloria, a supernatural sign has appeared: blood moon over groth. Factions scramble to interpret its meaning.

detail: a red stage walks up to Lord Adkison and speaks "here is the one who will unite them all"
lore: Across all of Aeloria, a supernatural sign has appeared: a red stage walks up to Lord Adkison and speaks "here is the one who will unite them all". Factions scramble to interpret its meaning.
